login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your PDS account

verification.title: Verify Your Account
verification.subtitle: Your account needs verification. Enter the code sent to your verification method.

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Create a new account on this PDS
register.handleDotWarning: Custom domain handles can be set up after account creation in Settings.
register.identityHint: Choose how your decentralized identity will be managed.
register.didPlcHint: Portable identity managed by PLC Directory
register.didWebHint: Identity hosted on this PDS (read warning below)
register.didWebWarning1Detail: Your identity will be {did}. Even if you migrate to another PDS later, this server must continue hosting your DID document.
register.didWebWarning2Detail: Unlike did:plc, did:web has no rotation keys. If this PDS goes offline permanently, your identity cannot be recovered.
register.didWebWarning3Detail: If you migrate away, we will continue serving a minimal DID document pointing to your new PDS. Your identity will remain functional.
register.didWebWarning4Detail: Choose did:plc unless you have a specific reason to prefer did:web.
register.externalDidHint: Your domain must serve a valid DID document at /.well-known/did.json pointing to this PDS
register.contactMethodHint: Choose how you'd like to verify your account and receive notifications. You only need one.
register.discordIdHint: Your numeric Discord user ID (enable Developer Mode to find it)

validation.handleNoDots: Handle cannot contain dots. You can set up a custom domain handle after creating your account.
validation.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.externalDidFormat: External DID must start with did:web:
validation.emailRequired: Email is required for email verification
validation.discordIdRequired: Discord ID is required for Discord verification
validation.telegramRequired: Telegram username is required for Telegram verification
validation.signalRequired: Phone number is required for Signal verification

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.deactivatedMessage: Your account is currently deactivated. This typically happens during account migration. Some features may be limited until your account is reactivated.
dashboard.navSessionsDesc: View and manage your login sessions
dashboard.navRepoDesc: Browse and manage raw AT Protocol records

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.customDomainDescription: Use your own domain as your handle. You need to verify domain ownership first.
settings.setupMethodsIntro: Choose one of these verification methods:
settings.dnsMethodDesc: Add this TXT record to your domain:
settings.httpMethodDesc: Serve your DID at this URL:
settings.exportDataDescription: Download your entire repository as a CAR (Content Addressable Archive) file. This includes all your posts, likes, follows, and other data.
settings.deleteWarning: This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted.

messages.emailCodeSent: Verification code sent to your current email
messages.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
messages.deletionCodeSent: Deletion confirmation sent to your email
messages.confirmDelete: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete your account? This cannot be undone.

appPasswords.title: App Passwords
appPasswords.description: App passwords let you sign in to third-party apps without giving them your main password. Each app password can be revoked individually.
appPasswords.createdMessage: Copy this password now. You won't be able to see it again.
appPasswords.revokeConfirm: Revoke app password "{name}"? Apps using this password will no longer be able to access your account.

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.revokeCurrentConfirm: This will log you out of this session. Continue?
sessions.revokeAllConfirm: This will revoke {count} other session(s). Continue?

inviteCodes.title: Invite Codes
inviteCodes.description: Invite codes let you invite friends to join. Each code can be used once.
inviteCodes.disableConfirm: Disable this invite code? It can no longer be used.

security.title: Security
security.passkeysDescription: Passkeys provide secure, passwordless authentication using your device's built-in security (fingerprint, face, or PIN).
security.deletePasskeyConfirm: Delete passkey "{name}"? You won't be able to use it to sign in anymore.
security.totpDescription: Use an authenticator app like Google Authenticator, Authy, or 1Password for two-factor authentication.
security.totpSetupInstructions: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code to verify.
security.backupCodesDescription: Use these codes to sign in if you lose access to your authenticator app. Each code can only be used once.
security.regenerateConfirm: Regenerate backup codes? Your current codes will no longer work.
security.legacyLoginDescription: Allow signing in with username/password directly (legacy mode). When disabled, you must use OAuth with MFA.
security.legacyLoginWarning: Warning: Enabling legacy login bypasses MFA for direct password logins. Only enable if needed for app compatibility.
security.totpPasswordWarning: With TOTP enabled, changing your password from the Bluesky app (or other legacy apps) will be blocked. To change your password, you have two options:
security.totpPasswordOption1Suffix: where you can verify with your authenticator app.
security.totpPasswordOption2Suffix: to verify your Bluesky session with TOTP, then password changes will work temporarily.
security.legacyAppsDescription: Some apps (like the official Bluesky app) use older authentication that only requires your password. When you have MFA enabled, these apps bypass your second factor. Disabling legacy login forces all apps to use OAuth, which properly enforces MFA.
security.removePasswordConfirm: Remove your password? You'll need to use passkeys to sign in.
security.passwordDescription: Manage your account password. If you have passkeys set up, you can optionally remove your password for a fully passwordless experience.
security.disableTotpWarning: This will make your account less secure.
security.removePasswordWarning: This will make your account passkey-only. You'll only be able to sign in using your registered passkeys. If you lose access to all your passkeys, you can recover your account using your notification channel.
security.beforeProceedingItem1: Make sure you have at least one reliable passkey registered
security.beforeProceedingItem2: Consider registering passkeys on multiple devices
security.beforeProceedingItem3: Ensure your recovery notification channel is up to date
security.addPasskeyFirst: Add at least one passkey before you can remove your password.
security.passkeyOnlyHint: You sign in using passkeys only. If you ever lose access to your passkeys, you can recover your account using the "Lost passkey?" link on the login page.
security.trustedDevicesDescription: Manage devices that can skip two-factor authentication when signing in. Trust is granted for 30 days and automatically extends when you use the device.
security.legacyLoginDisabled: Legacy app login disabled - only OAuth apps can sign in
security.passwordRemoved: Password removed. Your account is now passkey-only.
security.passkeysNotSupported: Passkeys are not supported in this browser

comms.title: Communication Preferences
comms.description: Choose how you want to receive important messages like password resets, security alerts, and account updates.
comms.preferredChannelDescription: Select your preferred way to receive messages. You must configure a channel before you can select it.
comms.emailManagedInSettings: Your email is managed in Account Settings
comms.discordIdHint: Your Discord user ID (not username). Enable Developer Mode in Discord to copy it.
comms.telegramHint: Your Telegram username without the @ symbol
comms.signalHint: Your Signal phone number with country code
comms.historyDescription: View recent messages sent to your account.

repoExplorer.title: Repository Explorer
repoExplorer.description: Browse and manage your raw AT Protocol records.
repoExplorer.deleteConfirm: Delete record {rkey}? This cannot be undone.
repoExplorer.noCollectionsYet: No collections yet. Create your first record to get started.
repoExplorer.autoGeneratedHint: Leave empty to auto-generate a TID-based key
repoExplorer.demoPostText: Hello from my PDS! This is my first post.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.deleteConfirm: Delete account @{handle}? This cannot be undone.

login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue to the application
login.passkeyHintNotAvailable: No passkeys registered for this account

consent.title: Authorize Application
consent.permissions: This application will be able to:
consent.writePosts: Create and delete posts on your behalf
consent.rememberChoiceLabel: Remember my choice for this application

twoFactorCode.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactorCode.subtitle: A verification code has been sent to your {channel}. Enter the code below to continue.

totp.title: Enter Authenticator Code
totp.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
totp.hintDefault: 6 digits for authenticator, 8 characters for backup code

passkey.title: Passkey Verification
passkey.subtitle: Use your passkey to verify your identity

verify.title: Verify Your Account
verify.subtitle: We've sent a verification code to your {channel}. Enter it below to complete registration.
verify.startOver: Start over with a different account
verify.noPendingInfo: If you recently created an account and need to verify it, you may need to create a new account. If you already verified your account, you can sign in.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter the code you received and choose a new password.
resetPassword.forgotSubtitle: Enter your handle or email and we'll send you a code to reset your password.
resetPassword.codeSent: Password reset code sent! Check your preferred notification channel.
resetPassword.enterCode: Enter the code from your email and your new password.
resetPassword.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

recoverPasskey.title: Recover Your Account
recoverPasskey.invalidLinkMessage: This recovery link is invalid or has been corrupted. Please request a new recovery email.
recoverPasskey.successMessage: Your temporary password has been set. You can now sign in with this password.
recoverPasskey.successNextSteps: After signing in, we recommend adding a new passkey in your security settings to restore passkey-only authentication.
recoverPasskey.subtitle: Set a temporary password to regain access to your passkey-only account.
recoverPasskey.whatHappensNextDetail: After setting this password, you can sign in and add a new passkey in your security settings. Once you have a new passkey, you can optionally remove the temporary password.

validation.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

errors.invalidLink: Invalid recovery link. Please request a new one.
errors.expired: This recovery link has expired. Please request a new one.

requestPasskeyRecovery.title: Recover Passkey Account
requestPasskeyRecovery.subtitle: Lost access to your passkey? Enter your handle or email and we'll send you a recovery link.
requestPasskeyRecovery.successMessage: If your account exists and is a passkey-only account, you'll receive a recovery link at your preferred notification channel.
requestPasskeyRecovery.successInfo: The link will expire in 1 hour. Check your email, Discord, Telegram, or Signal depending on your account settings.
requestPasskeyRecovery.howItWorksDetail: We'll send a secure link to your registered notification channel. Click the link to set a temporary password. Then you can sign in and add a new passkey.

registerPasskey.title: Create Passkey Account
registerPasskey.subtitle: Create a passwordless account using a passkey.

trustedDevices.title: Trusted Devices
trustedDevices.description: Trusted devices can skip two-factor authentication when logging in. Trust is granted for 30 days and automatically extends when you use the device.
trustedDevices.noDevicesHint: When you log in with two-factor authentication enabled, you can choose to trust the device for 30 days.
trustedDevices.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke trust for this device? You will need to enter your 2FA code next time you log in from this device.

reauth.title: Re-authentication Required
reauth.subtitle: Please verify your identity to continue.
